arts.ttl: Almost a perfect weekend for Arsenal, plus what next for in-form Gunners loanee?
arts.sum: Almost a perfect weekend for Arsenal, so what’s the state of the title race now? With about 25 minutes to go at Southampton on Sunday, it was looking like turning into a near perfect weekend for Arsenal in the Premier League. Mikel Arteta’s side produced their best performance of the season so far on Saturday […] The post Almost a perfect weekend for Arsenal, plus what next for in-form Gunners loanee? appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Ethan Nwaneri sends clear message to Mikel Arteta after first Premier League goal
arts.sum: Ethan Nwaneri scored his first Premier League goal in Arsenal’s win against Nottingham Forest at the Emirates Stadium and has now spoken out on his debut strike amid Mikel Arteta praise

arts.ttl: Arsenal include forgotten defender in squad for Sporting Lisbon clash amid injury woes
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly include forgotten defender Kieran Tierney in their travelling squad for Tuesday night's Champions League clash at Sporting Lisbon..

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim sends message to Sporting Lisbon successor after leaving for Man Utd
arts.sum: Sporting Lisbon have embarked on their own new era after waving a sad farewell to successful boss Ruben Amorim after his appointment by Manchester United and replacing him with Joao Pereira

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners 'set to reject' any approaches from Real Madrid for key defender
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly preparing to reject all offers for centre-back William Saliba in January and the summer amid interest from Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah shows true colours with wordless message to Liverpool owners amid Arsenal title battle
arts.sum: He said: "Well, we are almost in December and I haven't received any offers yet to stay in the club, [so] I'm probably more out than in. Mohamed Salah is sending a wordless message to Liverpool's owners about his future at the club.

arts.ttl: Riccardo Calafiori dropped, big Declan Rice decision - Arsenal Champions League lineups vs Sporting - Lee Wilmot - football.london
arts.sum: Kaynak's team: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Zinchenko; Partey, Rice, Odegaard; Saka, Havertz, Martinelli. Wilmot's team: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Calafiori; Jorginho, Partey, Odegaard; Saka, Havertz, Martinelli.

arts.ttl: Sporting CP willing to drop Viktor Gyokeres' release clause
arts.sum: Viktor Gyokeres scored his 24th goal of the new season in Sporting CP’s 6-0 hammering of Amarante FC last Friday, continuing his incredible form ahead of the return of Champions League action. Premier League teams are the best-placed to stump up the huge transfer fee that Sporting would certainly demand for their top talent but may not have to pay his listed release clause.

arts.ttl: Pepe opens up on Arsenal ordeal: 'I paid the price'
arts.sum: Nicolas Pepe has revealed just how heavy of a burden the record transfer fee Arsenal spent on him was. “Arsenal spent a lot of money on me and I paid the price for it,” he said before explaining how it was Emery, not Arsenal, that convinced him to move to England.

arts.ttl: Former Arsenal star Nicklas Bendtner caught up in HORROR knife attack while visiting New York - as Dane narrowly escapes serious injury
arts.sum: Former Arsenal star Nicklas Bendtner avoided being stabbed during a horrific incident after a knife-wielding individual attacked the group he was with during a stroll through New York.
